title: Functional Requirement frontmatter schema
description: Schema for FR artifacts — functional requirements specifying what the system shall do. Reverse links (delivered_by, implemented_by, verified_by) are computed by the traceability script.

parent_epic.description: Wiki link to the parent Epic

derives_from.description: Wiki links to parent BRQ, BR, or CTRL artifacts this requirement is derived from

depends_on.description: Wiki links to other FR/NFR this requirement depends on

source_docs.description: External document references. Only if derives_from is empty (direct stakeholder requirement).
